growth_picks.analyst_take: 36x fwd P/E after 191% run and only 6% to target — poor risk/reward despite AI test tailwind

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: $42.6B spectrum deals ($22.65B AT&T, ~$20B SpaceX). SpaceX IPO catalyst. $14.5B net loss, negative FCF, $7B debt due 2026. FCC protests. [Tier 1-2: SatNews, Bloomberg]

Discovery: Massive unusual call activity on Mar 25 with 8,524 contracts at $150 strike (Jun 18 expiry) as stock surged 10.1% on The Information report that SpaceX could file IPO imminently — options volume over 80% of average daily stock volume; concentrated bullish positioning ahead of potential satellite/space sector catalyst
growth_picks.analyst_take: $42.6B spectrum deals dwarf market cap but $7B 2026 debt maturities and D/E 533% create existential risk

avoid_picks.analyst_take: Federal criminal indictment (co-founder, $2.5B China smuggling), SEC probe, serial governance failures — uninvestable until legal clarity
